title: AN ACT CREATING A CERTAIN BARRIO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GINGOOG, PROVINCE 0F MISAMIS ORIENTAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5394 / 53 OG No. 16, 5146 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1717, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING A CERTAIN BARRIO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GINGOOG, PROVINCE 0F MISAMIS ORIENTAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Malibod, Municipality of Gingoog, Province of Misamis Oriental, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Malibod.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
